Pousali Dasgupta

Amazon Ads Specialist · Marketplace Growth Strategist · Brand Performance Optimizer

I help brands scale on Amazon through data-driven advertising, listing optimization, and marketplace growth strategies. Multi-marketplace experience across US and UAE.

View WorkDownload ResumeContact

About

I help brands scale on Amazon through data-driven advertising, listing optimization, and marketplace growth strategies.

With experience managing multi-marketplace accounts across US and UAE, I specialize in building scalable advertising frameworks that improve TACoS, ACOS, and organic ranking.

Learn more about me →

Core Expertise

  • Amazon PPC

    Sponsored Products, Brands, and Display campaigns with data-driven bidding and structure.

  • Listing Optimization

    Titles, bullets, A+ content, and backend keywords for discoverability and conversion.

  • Keyword & Search Term Strategy

    Search term mining, keyword harvesting, and negative keyword management.

  • Product Launch Strategy

    Phased launch playbooks that balance paid and organic for sustainable growth.

  • Marketplace Expansion

    Multi-marketplace account structure and scaling across US, UAE, and more.

    Omega 3 Product Launch
